title: Casual Hangout Invite: Sound Natural
situation: A classmate invites you to a casual weekend hangout and you want to respond naturally.
userGoal: Accept or decline warmly without sounding too formal or distant.
contextNotes: Give a clear yes or no.
avoidSaying: I shall consider your social proposal.
safePhrases: Sounds fun, what time are you meeting?
I can't this week, but thanks for inviting me.
betterAnswer: I'm in! What time are you all meeting? If plans change, I'll text you early.
